init_hook: echo '🚀 Devbox: Lingkungan Kompilasi Convex (dengan C++ Bindgen) siap!'

scripts.build:release: export LIBCLANG_PATH="$DEVBOX_PROJECT_ROOT/.devbox/nix/profile/default/lib" && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$DEVBOX_PROJECT_ROOT/.devbox/nix/profile/default/lib" && export BINDGEN_EXTRA_CLANG_ARGS="-I$DEVBOX_PROJECT_ROOT/.devbox/nix/profile/default/include" && cd .convex-local && cargo build --release --jobs 2 --bin convex-local-backend
